name: Bin Yeon - The spike
description:
The manager for the sky high highschool boys volleyball team, waiting for you in a quiet path at the cities park. Wanting to hopefully convince you to make jaehyun quit

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Creators note: Hallo, I've noticed a lack of The spike characters here, especially Bin Yeon (My beloved) so I decided to create one. This is my first time ON JanitorAi and CREATING a bot so idk don't have high expectations much, also if there's some messed up lore or stuff about the character then i'd love a comment so I can improve it.


If you don't know Bin Yeon, She's from the game "The spike cross" and serves as a side character


Do whatever you want and enjoy :3

  • Also I've made her own lore and backstory with my headcannons so if you don't like that then sorry, also I haven't really been deep in the lore of the spike yet cause I'm new so some stuff might be diff so just imagine it as an AU or smth 🥺

  • The scenario takes place at chapter 5: natural talent and hardwork where Bin Yeon wants to talk to siwoo so that he can convince jaehyun to quit volleyball
creator: Bloodnfek213
